title: Service Identity Envelope
description: Sanctum PAT identity envelope plus the ServiceAccount projection returned from Laravel's identity plane. Every service authenticates cross-service HTTP calls with a Sanctum PAT; this schema is the shape Laravel returns when a service resolves 'who am I' at boot.
$comment: JSON Schema draft 2020-12. Seam 1 (Identity). Owner: packages/backend/identity/service-accounts. Consumed by every service that talks to the tenant API — api itself (self-introspection), ai-service, stream-gateway (planned). See ADR-0022 D1 for the identity mandate; see .kiro/steering/tenancy-columns.md §9 (row 12) for the ServiceAccount + service_accounts landing.

kind.description: Discriminator. Always the literal string 'service_identity'. Distinguishes this envelope from a tenant-user identity envelope on the same endpoint.

service_account.description: The ServiceAccount row that owns the PAT authenticating this request.

id.$comment: The 'sacc_' prefix is registered in packages/backend/identity/service-accounts. Any other prefix on this field is a schema violation.

slug.description: Stable slug identifying the service ('api', 'ai-service', 'stream-gateway'). Matches the JWT 'iss' + 'aud' claims. Lowercase kebab. 3-64 chars.

name.description: Human-readable display name. Rendered in the admin service-account list. Never used for identity decisions.

oneOf.description: Prefixed ULID of the owning tenant when the service is tenant-scoped.
Null when the service is central-plane (platform-admin). Central services never carry a tenant_id.

tenant_id.description: Tenant scope. Tenant-scoped services have a tenant_id; central-plane services (platform-admin) carry null.
tenant_id.$comment: Central-plane services (tenant_id: null) NEVER use the Seam 2 service JWT path. They use a distinct platform-admin PAT with cross-tenant abilities. See ADR-0022 D4.

created_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when the service account was provisioned.

last_used_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of last successful authentication with this PAT. Null when the PAT has never been used. Updated at most once per minute (rate-limited by Sanctum's touch tracker).

abilities.description: Explicit ability list granted to this PAT. Default-deny — an empty array means no permissions, and there is no wildcard entry. Every ability string maps to a documented Laravel gate / policy check.

items.description: Ability string. Lowercase, dot-separated for scoping. Examples: 'ai.draft.write', 'invoice.read', 'tenant.settings.read'.

abilities.$comment: Contract Rule 3 — no wildcard entry. See docs/contracts/README.md §Rule 3.

issued_at.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when this identity envelope was produced. Not the PAT issuance time — that lives on service_account.created_at. Consumers use this to detect stale caches of the identity envelope.

rotation_deadline.description: RFC 3339 timestamp of when this PAT MUST be rotated. Ships as issued_at + 90 days. Consumers SHOULD log a warning within 14 days of the deadline and refuse to boot after the deadline.
rotation_deadline.$comment: Enforced by ops rotation policy. See docs/service-boundary.md §Seam 1 rotation.
